data.goalText: Quiero lograr obtener un flujo de 3k dolares por mes en argentina

data.summary_es: Inicio de corrida para el objetivo "Quiero lograr obtener un flujo de 3k dolares por mes en argentina".
El interprete empezo a desambiguar el objetivo.
El interprete completo interpretacion con respuesta del modelo.
Objetivo interpretado como QUANT_TARGET_TRACKING con confianza 64%.

details.normalizedGoal: Earn a monthly income stream of 3,000 US dollars while living in Argentina.
ambiguities: No timeline is specified for when the $3,000/month income needs to be achieved or maintained.
The method of generating the income (employment, freelancing, investments, business) is unspecified, which affects the strategy.
The available resources, skills, or current income base are unknown, making it unclear what starting point the plan should build from.
The meaning of “flujo” (cash flow) is vague—whether it means net profit, salary, or passive income.
assumptions: There are viable opportunities in or accessible from Argentina that can provide a steady USD income of about $3,000 per month.
They have or can acquire the necessary skills, capital, or resources to create such an income stream.
The local regulations, currency controls, and tax implications will allow them to receive and use the income as intended.
